key.name: randomize
key.description: If true, wallpapers are shuffled and cycle on a timer. If false, wallpapers are statically assigned per monitor.

key.name: same-image-all-monitors
key.summary: Use same image on all monitors
key.description: If true, a single image is applied across all monitors instead of a unique image for each.

key.name: interval
key.description: How often to change the background image per monitor (ignored if randomize is false).

key.name: folder
key.description: Path to the folder containing wallpaper images.

key.name: monitor-settings
key.description: JSON dictionary mapping monitor index to its scaling strategy.

key.name: monitor-images
key.description: JSON dictionary mapping monitor index to a specific image file path.
